key_sentences.chinese: 他不但擅长传统绘画，而且在雕塑方面也很有才华。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tā bú dàn shàn cháng chuán tǒng huì huà, ér qiě zài diāo sù fāng miàn yě hěn yǒu cái huá.

key_sentences.chinese: 通过这次展览，观众对中国文化遗产有了更深的了解。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tōng guò zhè cì zhǎn lǎn, guān zhòng duì Zhōng guó wén huà yí chǎn yǒu le gèng shēn de liǎo jiě.
key_sentences.english: Through this exhibition, the audience gained a deeper understanding of China's cultural heritage.

key_sentences.chinese: 这位艺术家的风格独特，每一件作品都令人印象深刻。

key_sentences.english: This artist's style is unique; every piece leaves a deep impression on the viewer.

key_sentences.chinese: 民间艺术是人民智慧的结晶，值得我们好好传承。

key_sentences.english: Folk art is the crystallisation of people's wisdom and is worth preserving well.

key_sentences.chinese: 博物馆里的表演让游客感受到了传统文化的魅力。

key_sentences.english: The performance in the museum allowed visitors to experience the charm of traditional culture.

key_sentences.chinese: 通过表演和展览，人们更好地了解了中国的文化遗产。

key_sentences.english: Through performances and exhibitions, people have gained a better understanding of China's cultural heritage.

grammar_points.title: 并且 — Moreover; and also; furthermore
grammar_points.explanation:
并且 is a conjunction meaning "moreover", "and also", or "furthermore". It connects two clauses or elements to add information, showing that both points are true simultaneously. Unlike 但是 (contrast) or 因为 (cause), 并且 is purely additive.

Structures:
• Subject + clause 1 + 并且 + clause 2
• Clause 1 + 并且 + clause 2 (different or same subjects)

• 他擅长传统绘画，并且在雕塑创作方面也有很高的造诣。
  (He excels at traditional painting and is also highly accomplished in sculpture.)
• 民间文化遗产需要传承，并且要让更多年轻人了解和欣赏。
  (Folk cultural heritage needs to be passed down, and moreover, more young people need to appreciate it.)

Notes:
• 并且 is more formal than 也 and slightly more emphatic than 而且
• The second clause introduced by 并且 often carries additional weight or importance
• Both clauses share a common direction — they reinforce, not contradict, each other

examples.chinese: 他擅长传统绘画，并且在雕塑创作方面也有很高的造诣。
examples.pinyin: tā shàn cháng chuán tǒng huì huà bìng qiě zài diāo sù chuàng zuò fāng miàn yě yǒu hěn gāo de zào yì
examples.english: He excels at traditional painting and is also highly accomplished in sculpture.

examples.chinese: 博物馆的展览内容丰富，并且吸引了许多热爱文化遗产的观众。
examples.pinyin: bó wù guǎn de zhǎn lǎn nèi róng fēng fù bìng qiě xī yǐn le xǔ duō rè ài wén huà yí chǎn de guān zhòng
examples.english: The museum's exhibition is rich in content and has also attracted many audiences who love cultural heritage.

examples.chinese: 这位艺术家的作品风格独特，并且受到了广大观众的欣赏。
examples.pinyin: zhè wèi yì shù jiā de zuò pǐn fēng gé dú tè bìng qiě shòu dào le guǎng dà guān zhòng de xīn shǎng
examples.english: This artist's works have a unique style and have also been appreciated by a wide audience.

exercises.question: 这次博物馆展览内容精彩，___吸引了很多民间文化爱好者。
Which sentence correctly uses 并且?
exercises.correct: 他的作品风格独特，并且每一件都受到了观众的高度欣赏。
options: 他的作品风格独特，并且每一件都受到了观众的高度欣赏。
并且他的作品风格独特，每一件都受到了观众高度欣赏。
他的作品风格独特并且，每一件都高度欣赏观众了。
观众高度欣赏并且，他的作品风格独特每一件。
option_pinyin: tā de zuò pǐn fēng gé dú tè bìng qiě měi yī jiàn dōu shòu dào le guān zhòng de gāo dù xīn shǎng

exercises.question: What does 并且 express?
exercises.correct: Moreover; and also — adds a second fact or quality to the first (additive, not contrasting)
options: Moreover; and also — adds a second fact or quality to the first (additive, not contrasting)
Although; even though — introduces a concession
Because; therefore — introduces a cause and result
No matter how — introduces a condition that cannot change the result

mini_exercises.question: 并且 means...
mini_exercises.correct: Moreover; and also — adds a second point that reinforces the first (additive relationship)
options: Moreover; and also — adds a second point that reinforces the first (additive relationship)
However; but — introduces a contrast to the first point
Because — introduces the reason for the first point
No matter — introduces a condition regardless of the result

mini_exercises.question: Fill in: The museum's exhibition is wonderful and has also attracted many visitors.
mini_exercises.question_chinese: 博物馆的展览内容精彩，___吸引了很多热爱文化遗产的观众。
mini_exercises.question_pinyin: 博物馆的展览内容精彩，___吸引了很多热爱文化遗产的观众。
mini_exercises.question_english: The museum's exhibition is wonderful and has also attracted many visitors who love cultural heritage.

mini_exercises.question: Which sentence correctly uses 并且?
mini_exercises.correct: 她擅长创作传统风格的作品，并且对文化遗产的传承也很有热情。
options: 她擅长创作传统风格的作品，并且对文化遗产的传承也很有热情。
并且她擅长，创作传统风格的作品文化遗产传承热情。
文化遗产传承并且，她擅长创作传统风格作品热情。
她创作传统风格并且，作品文化遗产传承擅长热情。
option_pinyin: tā shàn cháng chuàng zuò chuán tǒng fēng gé de zuò pǐn bìng qiě duì wén huà yí chǎn de chuán chéng yě hěn yǒu rè qíng

grammar_points.title: 再…也… — No matter how… still…
grammar_points.explanation:
再…也… expresses that even under an extreme degree or condition, the result in the main clause remains unchanged. 再 introduces the degree (how adj/adv something is), and 也 introduces the result that holds regardless.

Structures:
• 再 + adjective + 也 + verb phrase
• 再 + adverb + verb + 也 + verb phrase
• 再 + adjective + 的 + noun + 也 + verb phrase

• 再有才华的艺术家，也需要长期创作才能形成独特的风格。
  (No matter how talented an artist is, they still need long-term creative work to develop their unique style.)
• 这件雕塑再精美，也需要认真传承才能流传后世。
  (No matter how exquisite this sculpture is, it still needs to be carefully passed on.)

Notes:
• 再 here is not the adverb "again" — it means "no matter how"
• The 也 clause often contains a negative verb (不, 没) or an emphasis on inevitability
• This pattern is stronger and more emphatic than 无论…也…

examples.chinese: 再有才华的艺术家，也需要长期创作才能形成独特的风格。
examples.pinyin: zài yǒu cái huá de yì shù jiā yě xū yào cháng qī chuàng zuò cái néng xíng chéng dú tè de fēng gé
examples.english: No matter how talented an artist is, they still need long-term creative work to develop their unique style.

examples.chinese: 这件雕塑再精美，也需要认真传承才能流传后世。
examples.pinyin: zhè jiàn diāo sù zài jīng měi yě xū yào rèn zhēn chuán chéng cái néng liú chuán hòu shì
examples.english: No matter how exquisite this sculpture is, it still needs to be carefully passed on to future generations.

examples.chinese: 博物馆的展览再精彩，也只是暂时的，文化遗产的传承才是根本。
examples.pinyin: bó wù guǎn de zhǎn lǎn zài jīng cǎi yě zhǐ shì zàn shí de wén huà yí chǎn de chuán chéng cái shì gēn běn
examples.english: No matter how wonderful the museum's exhibition is, it's only temporary; the inheritance of cultural heritage is what matters most.

exercises.question: 民间艺术___古老，___需要我们认真传承下去。
Which sentence correctly uses 再…也…?
exercises.correct: 这次展览再精彩，也只有一周，要好好欣赏每一件作品。
options: 这次展览再精彩，也只有一周，要好好欣赏每一件作品。
这次展览也精彩，再只有一周，要好好欣赏每一件作品。
再这次展览精彩，也只有一周好好欣赏每一件作品。
这次展览精彩再，好好欣赏也只有一周每一件作品。
option_pinyin: zhè cì zhǎn lǎn zài jīng cǎi yě zhǐ yǒu yī zhōu yào hǎo hǎo xīn shǎng měi yī jiàn zuò pǐn

exercises.question: What does 再…也… express?
exercises.correct: "No matter how [adj/adv]… still…" — the result holds even under an extreme degree or condition
options: "No matter how [adj/adv]… still…" — the result holds even under an extreme degree or condition
"Both… and…" — two positive qualities exist together
"Although… still…" — acknowledges a concession, then states the result
"Because… therefore…" — introduces a cause and its effect

mini_exercises.question: 再…也… means...
mini_exercises.correct: "No matter how [adj/adv]… still [result]" — emphasises that the result holds even under extreme conditions
options: "No matter how [adj/adv]… still [result]" — emphasises that the result holds even under extreme conditions
"Not only… but also…" — accumulates two positive qualities
"Although… still…" — concedes a fact and states a contrasting result

mini_exercises.question: Fill in: No matter how unique this work is, it still needs to be carefully preserved.
mini_exercises.question_chinese: 这件作品___独特，也需要认真传承，让更多人欣赏到。
mini_exercises.question_pinyin: 这件作品___独特，也需要认真传承，让更多人欣赏到。
mini_exercises.question_english: No matter how unique this work is, it still needs to be carefully preserved so more people can appreciate it.

mini_exercises.question: Which sentence correctly uses 再…也…?
mini_exercises.correct: 再有名的艺术家，也需要不断创作才能保持自己独特的风格。
options: 再有名的艺术家，也需要不断创作才能保持自己独特的风格。
有名的艺术家再，也需要不断创作才能保持独特风格。
艺术家再有名，需要不断创作也才能保持风格独特。
也有名的艺术家，再需要不断创作才能保持独特风格。
option_pinyin: zài yǒu míng de yì shù jiā yě xū yào bù duàn chuàng zuò cái néng bǎo chí zì jǐ dú tè de fēng gé

grammar_points.title: 对于 — Regarding; as for; with regard to
grammar_points.explanation:
对于 is a preposition meaning "regarding", "as for", "with regard to", or "in relation to". It introduces the topic or object that the main clause discusses or evaluates.

Structures:
• 对于 + topic noun/phrase + (subject) + predicate
• Subject + 对于 + topic + predicate

• 对于民间文化遗产的传承，我们每个人都有责任。
  (As for the inheritance of folk cultural heritage, each of us has a responsibility.)
• 对于这次博物馆展览，观众的反响非常热烈。
  (Regarding this museum exhibition, the audience's response was very enthusiastic.)

Notes:
• 对于 is more formal than 对 and specifically introduces a topic for discussion
• 对于 can appear at the start of the sentence (most common) or after the subject
• Do not confuse with 对 (toward/to) — 对于 always introduces a topic, not a direction of action

examples.chinese: 对于民间文化遗产的传承，我们每个人都有责任。
examples.pinyin: duì yú mín jiān wén huà yí chǎn de chuán chéng wǒ men měi gè rén dōu yǒu zé rèn
examples.english: Regarding the inheritance of folk cultural heritage, each of us has a responsibility.

examples.chinese: 对于雕塑创作，他有着独特的风格和深厚的才华。
examples.pinyin: duì yú diāo sù chuàng zuò tā yǒu zhe dú tè de fēng gé hé shēn hòu de cái huá
examples.english: With regard to sculpture, he has a unique style and deep talent.

examples.chinese: 对于这次博物馆展览，观众的反响非常热烈。
examples.pinyin: duì yú zhè cì bó wù guǎn zhǎn lǎn guān zhòng de fǎn xiǎng fēi cháng rè liè
examples.english: As for this museum exhibition, the audience's response was very enthusiastic.

exercises.question: ___民间文化遗产的传承，年轻一代应该积极参与。
Which sentence correctly uses 对于?
exercises.correct: 对于民间艺术的欣赏，每个人都有不同的感受。
options: 对于民间艺术的欣赏，每个人都有不同的感受。
民间艺术对于的欣赏，每个人都有不同的感受。
每个人对于，民间艺术欣赏都有不同的感受。
欣赏对于民间，艺术每个人都有不同的感受。
option_pinyin: duì yú mín jiān yì shù de xīn shǎng měi gè rén dōu yǒu bù tóng de gǎn shòu

exercises.question: What does 对于 express?
exercises.correct: Regarding; as for — introduces the topic or object under discussion
options: Regarding; as for — introduces the topic or object under discussion
By means of — introduces the method by which something is achieved
Although; even though — introduces a concession
Because of — introduces a cause or reason

mini_exercises.question: 对于 means...
mini_exercises.correct: Regarding; as for — introduces the topic or person that the statement is about
options: Regarding; as for — introduces the topic or person that the statement is about
By means of; through — introduces the method used
Although — introduces a concession before the main point
And also; moreover — adds a second point to the first

mini_exercises.question: Fill in: Regarding the artworks at this exhibition, the audience all expressed great appreciation.
mini_exercises.question_chinese: ___这次展览的作品，观众们都表示非常欣赏。
mini_exercises.question_pinyin: ___这次展览的作品，观众们都表示非常欣赏。
mini_exercises.question_english: Regarding the artworks at this exhibition, the audience all expressed great appreciation.

mini_exercises.question: Which sentence correctly uses 对于?
mini_exercises.correct: 对于传统文化的传承，博物馆和民间社团都在积极推广。
options: 对于传统文化的传承，博物馆和民间社团都在积极推广。
传统文化对于，博物馆传承民间社团都在积极推广。
博物馆对于，传统文化的传承民间社团推广积极。
传承对于传统文化的，博物馆和民间社团积极都在推广。
option_pinyin: duì yú chuán tǒng wén huà de chuán chéng bó wù guǎn hé mín jiān shè tuán dōu zài jī jí tuī guǎng

culture_notes.title: China's Intangible Cultural Heritage
culture_notes.content: China holds one of the richest collections of intangible cultural heritage (非物质文化遗产, fēi wù zhì wén huà yí chǎn) in the world. Recognised by UNESCO, China's entries include traditional arts such as Peking Opera (京剧, Jīng jù), shadow puppetry (皮影戏, pí yǐng xì), paper-cutting (剪纸, jiǎn zhǐ), and the intricate silk weaving of Suzhou (苏州丝绸, Sū zhōu sī chóu). These folk art forms have been passed down through generations and reflect the values, beliefs, and daily life of the Chinese people across centuries. The Chinese government actively promotes the protection and transmission of these traditions through national policies, museums, and community programmes. Visiting a local folk art workshop or an intangible heritage exhibition (非遗展览, fēi yí zhǎn lǎn) is one of the best ways for learners to connect with living Chinese culture.

idioms.english: A hundred flowers bloom — a flourishing of diverse arts and culture

quiz.question: What does 艺术 mean?
Which word means 'exhibition; to exhibit'?
What does 欣赏 mean?
Which word means 'sculpture; to sculpt'?
What does 文化遗产 mean?
Which word means 'folk; among the people'?
What does 博物馆 mean?
What does 传统 mean?
Fill in the blank: 这幅画 _____ 慢慢欣赏，每一个细节都很精彩。
What does 值得 mean?
Fill in the blank: 他 _____ 擅长绘画，_____ 在音乐方面也很有才华。
Choose the sentence that uses 通过 correctly.
quiz.correct: 通过这次展览，我们了解了更多文化遗产。
options: 通过这次展览，我们了解了更多文化遗产。
这次展览通过，我们文化遗产了解了。
我们通过，这次展览文化遗产了解了。
文化遗产通过了解，我们这次展览了。

quiz.question: What does 创作 mean?
What does the phrase 艺术风格 mean?
What does 表演 mean?
Which phrase means 'to visit an exhibition'?
What does 作品 mean?
The idiom 百花齐放 refers to:
quiz.correct: A flourishing of diverse arts and culture
options: A flourishing of diverse arts and culture
A single flower blooming in winter

quiz.question: What does the phrase 民间艺术 mean?
Which grammar pattern means 'by means of; through'?
What does '博物馆展览' mean?
Fill in: 参观博物馆展览是欣赏传统文化 _____ 的好方法。

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 陈老师，这幅画的风格和其他作品很不一样，这是哪个时代的？
lines.pinyin: Chén lǎo shī, zhè fú huà de fēng gé hé qí tā zuò pǐn hěn bù yí yàng, zhè shì nǎ gè shí dài de?
lines.english: Mr Chen, this painting's style is very different from the other works. Which era is it from?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 这是清代的一幅民间艺术作品，通过细腻的笔触展现了当时的生活风貌。
lines.pinyin: Zhè shì Qīng dài de yì fú mín jiān yì shù zuò pǐn, tōng guò xì nì de bǐ chù zhǎn xiàn le dāng shí de shēng huó fēng mào.
lines.english: This is a folk art work from the Qing dynasty; through delicate brushstrokes it captures the lifestyle of that era.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 真的非常值得欣赏！那边的雕塑也是同一时期的吗？
lines.pinyin: Zhēn de fēi cháng zhí de xīn shǎng! Nà biān de diāo sù yě shì tóng yì shí qī de ma?
lines.english: It's truly worth appreciating! Are the sculptures over there from the same period too?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 对，那些雕塑不但历史悠久，而且是国家级文化遗产，非常珍贵。
lines.pinyin: Duì, nà xiē diāo sù bú dàn lì shǐ yōu jiǔ, ér qiě shì guó jiā jí wén huà yí chǎn, fēi cháng zhēn guì.
lines.english: Yes, those sculptures are not only ancient but are also national-level cultural heritage items — extremely precious.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 博物馆这次的展览真的很精彩，吸引了好多人来参观。
lines.pinyin: Bó wù guǎn zhè cì de zhǎn lǎn zhēn de hěn jīng cǎi, xī yǐn le hǎo duō rén lái cān guān.
lines.english: This museum exhibition is really wonderful; it has attracted so many visitors.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 是的，我们希望通过展览，让更多人了解和热爱传统文化。
lines.pinyin: Shì de, wǒ men xī wàng tōng guò zhǎn lǎn, ràng gèng duō rén liǎo jiě hé rè ài chuán tǒng wén huà.
lines.english: Yes, we hope that through the exhibition, more people will come to understand and love traditional culture.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 下次有新展览，我一定再来！谢谢您的讲解。
lines.pinyin: Xià cì yǒu xīn zhǎn lǎn, wǒ yí dìng zài lái! Xiè xie nín de jiǎng jiě.
lines.english: When there is a new exhibition next time, I will definitely come again! Thank you for your explanation.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 杨绛，昨晚的京剧表演太精彩了！我之前从来没看过这种艺术形式。
lines.pinyin: Yáng Jiàng, zuó wǎn de Jīng jù biǎo yǎn tài jīng cǎi le! Wǒ zhī qián cóng lái méi kàn guò zhè zhǒng yì shù xíng shì.
lines.english: Yang Jiang, last night's Peking Opera performance was amazing! I had never seen this art form before.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 京剧是中国传统文化的代表，不但有悠久的历史，而且影响了很多亚洲国家。
lines.pinyin: Jīng jù shì Zhōng guó chuán tǒng wén huà de dài biǎo, bú dàn yǒu yōu jiǔ de lì shǐ, ér qiě yǐng xiǎng le hěn duō Yà zhōu guó jiā.
lines.english: Peking Opera represents Chinese traditional culture; it not only has a long history but has also influenced many Asian countries.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 演员的妆容和服装风格也很特别，他们都是怎么学习的？
lines.pinyin: Yǎn yuán de zhuāng róng hé fú zhuāng fēng gé yě hěn tè bié, tā men dōu shì zěn me xué xí de?
lines.english: The performers' make-up and costume style are also special. How do they all learn?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 他们需要通过多年严格的专业训练，才能掌握这门艺术。
lines.pinyin: Tā men xū yào tōng guò duō nián yán gé de zhuān yè xùn liàn, cái néng zhǎng wò zhè mén yì shù.
lines.english: Through years of rigorous professional training, they are able to master this art form.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我觉得这种表演真的值得向全世界推广，太有魅力了！
lines.pinyin: Wǒ jué de zhè zhǒng biǎo yǎn zhēn de zhí de xiàng quán shì jiè tuī guǎng, tài yǒu mèi lì le!
lines.english: I think this kind of performance is truly worth promoting to the whole world — it is so captivating!

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我很高兴你喜欢！下次有机会，我带你去博物馆看看关于京剧的历史文物。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ hěn gāo xìng nǐ xǐ huan! Xià cì yǒu jī huì, wǒ dài nǐ qù bó wù guǎn kàn kan guān yú Jīng jù de lì shǐ wén wù.
lines.english: I'm so glad you enjoy it! Next time there's a chance, I'll take you to the museum to see Peking Opera's historical artefacts.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 太好了，我一定要好好了解这份宝贵的文化遗产！
lines.pinyin: Tài hǎo le, wǒ yí dìng yào hǎo hǎo liǎo jiě zhè fèn bǎo guì de wén huà yí chǎn!
lines.english: Wonderful! I will definitely learn more about this precious cultural heritage!
